form.formComment: Has been racing well, including a win three back, last start finishing a close-up fourth (16.93) at Q Straight. Rates strongly and can return to winning form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been racing well, including a win three back, last start finishing a close-up fourth (16.93) at Q Straight. Rates strongly and can return to winning form.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Q Straight over 350m in 19.16 last start, beating Heading North. Should be prominent.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Q Straight over 350m in 19.16 last start, beating Heading North. Should be prominent.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest at big odds finishing third (21.97) at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Deserves respect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest at big odds finishing third (21.97) at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Deserves respect.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start was tightened, checked and turned sideways.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 390m at this track. Better off looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 390m at this track. Better off looking to others.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth in a Grade 5 on March 27 over 390m at this track behind Sutton's Magic, beaten 7 lengths (22.53). Can't make much of a case this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished fifth in a Grade 5 on March 27 over 390m at this track behind Sutton's Magic, beaten 7 lengths (22.53). Can't make much of a case this time.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by one length at this track over 352m (19.79) beating Federal Joker in Grade 5 on April 1. Hard to entertain this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fifth and beaten 4 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Has ability and looks a key chance.

formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when fifth and beaten 4 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Has ability and looks a key chance.

form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd on April 1 over 352m at this track behind Cheap Perfume beaten 1.75 lengths (20.01) in a Grade 5. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in her races. Last start finished eighth over 390m at this track, beaten 22 lengths. Prepared to risk this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the first turn was checked and then stumbled.
Severely checked in the first turn.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in her races. The latest effort was a 7 length seventh over 352m at this track. Likely to find this a bit tough.
